title: Add typed delta modifications and rename operation to spec change system

tasks.title: Implement applyRenameDelta and version bumping in archive/delta.ts (TDD: include application tests)
tasks.completed_by: Implemented applyRenameDelta in delta.ts: renames title, optionally renames ID (with duplicate check), preserves all other fields. Refactored bumpVersion to use hasPatchChange boolean covering modify/remove/rename. Full TDD red→green cycle complete.

red.output_snippet: 4 new rename failures: renames title, renames title+ID, fails non-existent, fails duplicate ID. Plus 1 version bump test. 3 pre-existing failures.

green.output_snippet: Tests 3 failed | 23 passed (26). All 3 failures are pre-existing in archiveChange block. All 5 new rename tests pass: renames title, renames title+ID, fails non-existent target, fails duplicate ID, version bump for rename.

tasks.title: Enforce delta application ordering in applyDeltasToSpec (TDD: include ordering tests)
tasks.completed_by: Added sortDeltas() with canonical order: rename(0) > remove(1) > modify(2) > add(3). applyDeltasToSpec now sorts before iterating. 4 TDD tests confirm ordering enforcement.

red.output_snippet: 4 new ordering test failures: enforces rename before modify, rename before remove, remove before add, full ordering (rename>remove>modify>add). 3 pre-existing failures. Tests 7 failed | 23 passed (30).

green.output_snippet: Tests 3 failed | 27 passed (30). All 3 failures are pre-existing. All 4 new ordering tests pass: rename before modify, rename before remove, remove before add, full ordering.

tasks.title: Implement checkIntraDeltaConflicts and validation codes in validator/ (TDD: include conflict detection tests)
tasks.completed_by: Added INTRA_DELTA_CONFLICT and RENAME_TARGET_NOT_FOUND validation codes. Implemented checkIntraDeltaConflicts detecting: rename+remove on same target, double rename, rename new_id collisions with add IDs. Updated checkDeltaTargetsExist to handle rename. Wired into runConflictChecks.

red.output_snippet: 4 new failures: rename+remove conflict, double rename, rename-add ID collision, rename target not found. Tests 4 failed | 26 passed (30).

green.output_snippet: Tests 30 passed (30). All 5 new intra-delta conflict tests pass: rename+remove conflict, double rename, rename-add collision, non-conflicting allowed, rename target not found.

tasks.completed_by: Absorbed into tk-iSOEqjAr: Validation codes are logically part of the conflict detection implementation.

tasks.title: Update SQLite delta upsert to handle rename operation in sqlite.ts
tasks.completed_by: Updated deltas table CHECK constraint to include 'rename'. Added migration to recreate table for existing DBs (cache-safe). Updated delta insert logic to store rename data (new_title, new_id) in changes_json column. Added test confirming rename delta round-trips correctly.

green.output_snippet: Tests 37 passed (37). New test confirms rename delta upsert: operation stored as 'rename', target_id preserved, new_title/new_id stored in changes_json.

tasks.title: Update completeness.ts ID format checks to handle rename deltas

red.output_snippet: 1 new failure: validates rename delta new_id format. Tests 1 failed | 31 passed (32).

green.output_snippet: Tests 32 passed (32). Both rename ID format tests pass: invalid format rejected, valid format accepted.

tasks.completed_by: Verified backward compatibility: all 13 existing change.json files have empty deltas or add-only. Added 3 tests confirming empty deltas, legacy add-only changes, and legacy add/modify/remove deltas all parse correctly with updated schemas.

tasks.title: Verify intra-delta conflict detection handles chains (e.g., rename rq-A to rq-B, then modify rq-B) (TDD)
tasks.completed_by: Added test verifying rename chains (rename rq-A to rq-B, then modify rq-B) are correctly allowed by checkIntraDeltaConflicts. The conflict detector only flags same-target conflicts, so chained operations on different IDs pass correctly.

tdd_evidence.skip_reason: Verification task: confirmed that rename chains (rename A→B, then modify B) are correctly handled — not flagged as conflicts since they target different IDs. Test added proving the chain is allowed.

tasks.title: Add structured logging for rename and typed modify operations in delta application flow
tasks.completed_by: Defined logDeltaResult function in delta.ts. Logs structured objects with spec name, delta ID, operation, success/failure, and operation-specific details (targetId, newTitle, newId for rename; targetId + changedKeys for modify; targetId for remove; newId for add). Failures logged via console.warn with error message. All 27 non-pre-existing tests pass.

requirement.title: Typed Delta Modifications
requirement.body: The delta system MUST enforce type safety for modifications to requirements. Any keys not present in the RequirementSchema MUST be rejected at parse time.

scenarios.title: Reject unknown keys
given: A DeltaModifySchema object with unknown keys
scenarios.when: The schema is parsed by Zod
then: The parse operation MUST fail with a validation error

requirement.title: Rename Operation
requirement.body: The delta system MUST support a rename operation that updates a requirement's title and optionally its ID while preserving all other fields.

scenarios.title: Successful rename
given: A rename delta targeting its ID

wisdom.content: Zod discriminatedUnion allows adding new members to the union without breaking existing parsing — adding DeltaRenameSchema to the union didn't affect any existing delta parsing. The .strict() modifier on DeltaModifyChangesSchema is the key to rejecting unknown keys while .passthrough() on RequirementSchema preserves forward compatibility for the requirement objects themselves.

Version bumping in bumpVersion was refactored to use a `hasPatchChange` boolean that checks for modify, remove, OR rename operations — all three bump patch. Only `add` bumps minor. This makes adding new patch-level operations trivial: just add to the hasPatchChange check.

Intra-delta conflict detection is context-free (doesn't need ValidationContext) — it only inspects the change's own deltas. This makes it callable without loading specs, useful for early feedback. Wired it into runConflictChecks alongside context-dependent checks by having checkIntraDeltaConflicts take only Change, not ValidationContext.

When adding a function call to existing code before defining the function, the code will fail with ReferenceError at runtime (not a type error caught at compile time in plain TS). Always define helper functions before or in the same session as adding calls to them — don't leave undefined references across session boundaries.
